home.heroTag: For the diaspora caring for loved ones back home
home.heroTitleAccent: Your peace of mind in Brooklyn.
home.heroSubtitle: The health of your loved ones in Haiti, tracked from your phone. One annual plan, a digital medical card, a network of verified doctors.
home.problemTitle: What the diaspora lives with today
home.problemLead: Three scenarios we hear every week from families.
home.problem1Body: You wire $400 to a cousin for a consultation. No receipt, no proof the doctor was seen, no visibility on what was prescribed.
home.problem2Body: Your parent says "I went to see someone." You have no way to verify the competence, the clinic, or whether the diagnosis is real.
home.problem3Body: A phone call wakes you up. You're in Montreal or Miami. Nobody knows which hospital to call, who to contact, or how much to send.
home.howItWorksTitle: How Vita Santé works for you
home.howItWorksLead: Four steps, built for the diaspora. From your phone to an active medical card in under 10 minutes.
home.step1Body: From Montreal, Brooklyn, Paris. In French or English. Secure card payment.
home.step2Body: From $99 to $5,000 per year. Visit count, lab coverage, Haiti-only or US network.
home.step3Title: 3. Your loved one gets a digital card
home.step3Body: Unique member code VSC-XXXXX-HT. A QR any network doctor scans in 10 seconds.
home.step4Body: Real-time notifications on every consultation. Remaining credits visible. Medical history accessible.
home.plansLead: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Annual billing.
home.networkLead: Vita Santé partners with verified clinics and hospitals across Haiti. From Port-au-Prince to Cap-Haïtien, your family is never far from competent care.
home.networkNote: Growing network. New partners added every month.
home.forDoctorsLead: We're looking for verified doctors in Port-au-Prince, Cap-Haïtien, Les Cayes, Jacmel. Application takes 5 minutes, response within 5 business days.
home.ctaBandTitle: Ready to protect your loved ones?
home.ctaBandLead: Create your account in minutes. Secure payment. Cancel anytime.
